name: Tree Hugging Simulator
detailed_description:
Tree Hugging Simulator is an authentic first-person experience of hugging birch trees. Are you in dire need of tree hugging, but don't have time to go out into nature? Well, welcome. Our authentic simulator will allow you to hug trees again, wherever you are. Just walk through the birch forest to relaxing music, enjoy nature, and hug the trees. Nothing superfluous. We tried to capture our love for hugging birch trees into interactive art, as well as to give everyone the opportunity to hug a tree again without leaving home. It is a meditative experience aimed at relaxation and peace.

Features:
-3D graphics
-First-person view
-Hug the birches. Just press E in front of a tree.
- Listen to the banger of ancient times: "in the field the birch stood"
-Explore a large open world. You can hug every birch tree you see
-Achievenents
